name: update_job
description: Update ProcessingJobs table fields. All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

markdown_s3_uri.description: S3 URI for extracted markdown content

match_doc_id.description: ID of matched document from similarity search

extracted_data_s3_uri.description: S3 URI for structured extracted data

status.description: Job status: CREATED, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED

name: get_job
description: Get a specific job by job_id from ProcessingJobs table

name: get_job_status
description: Get job status derived from latest ProcessingActions record

name: get_job_actions
description: Get all actions for a job from ProcessingActions table, sorted chronologically. Optionally filter by specific agent.

agent.description: Optional: Filter actions by specific agent name (e.g., 'analyzer', 'extractor', 'validator')

limit.description: Maximum number of actions to return (default: 100)

name: get_latest_action
description: Get the most recent action for a job from ProcessingActions table

name: get_recent_jobs
description: Get recent jobs by status, ordered by creation time (newest first). Returns up to 50 jobs.

status.description: Job status to filter by: CREATED, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED (default: CREATED)

limit.description: Maximum number of jobs to return (default: 50, max: 50)
